description: Colophon to a complete copy of the Pentateuch bought by Yaḥyā b. Hillel for his "dear son Ṭoviyya, the lovely flower the holy one." Dated: 976 years after the destruction of the Temple, which Goitein understands to be 1044 CE. (Information from Goitein, Med. Soc., vol. II, section vi, 2, n. 29)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
